title.en: The Robot That Dismantled the Sun
title.tr: The Robot That Dismantled the Sun
title.ar: The Robot That Dismantled the Sun

story.ru: Ночью люди в белых рабочих комбинезонах проникли на солнечную ферму, промышленным резаком уничтожили массив панелей и угнали сервисного робота. Прошу возместить оборудование и потерю выработки.
story.en: During the night, people in white coveralls entered the solar farm, destroyed the panel array with industrial cutters, and stole the service robot. I am claiming the equipment and lost generation.
story.tr: During the night, people in white coveralls entered the solar farm, destroyed the panel array with industrial cutters, and stole the service robot. I am claiming the equipment and lost generation.
story.ar: During the night, people in white coveralls entered the solar farm, destroyed the panel array with industrial cutters, and stole the service robot. I am claiming the equipment and lost generation.
story.kk: Ночью люди в белых рабочих комбинезонах проникли на солнечную ферму, промышленным резаком уничтожили массив панелей и угнали сервисного робота. Прошу возместить оборудование и потерю выработки.

content.ru: Воронов выпускает сервисного робота, загружает программу и открывает ему ворота. Посторонних людей не видно.
content.en: Voronov releases the service robot, uploads a program, and opens the gate for it. No outsiders are visible.
content.tr: Voronov releases the service robot, uploads a program, and opens the gate for it. No outsiders are visible.
content.ar: Voronov releases the service robot, uploads a program, and opens the gate for it. No outsiders are visible.
content.kk: Воронов выпускает сервисного робота, загружает программу и открывает ему ворота. Посторонних людей не видно.

contradictionExplanation.ru: Владелец сам запустил операцию перед заявленным нападением.
contradictionExplanation.en: The owner initiated the operation himself before the reported attack.
contradictionExplanation.tr: The owner initiated the operation himself before the reported attack.
contradictionExplanation.ar: The owner initiated the operation himself before the reported attack.
contradictionExplanation.kk: Владелец сам запустил операцию перед заявленным нападением.

reason.ar: The owner initiated the operation himself before the reported attack.
reason.kk: Владелец сам запустил операцию перед заявленным нападением.

content.ru: Получена задача «бережный демонтаж, сохранить разъёмы». Команда подписана администраторским ключом Воронова.
content.en: Task received: ‘careful dismantling; preserve connectors.’ The command is signed with Voronov's administrator key.
content.tr: Task received: ‘careful dismantling; preserve connectors.’ The command is signed with Voronov's administrator key.
content.ar: Task received: ‘careful dismantling; preserve connectors.’ The command is signed with Voronov's administrator key.
content.kk: Получена задача «бережный демонтаж, сохранить разъёмы». Команда подписана администраторским ключом Воронова.

contradictionExplanation.ru: Роботу приказали снять, а не уничтожить панели.
contradictionExplanation.en: The robot was ordered to remove the panels, not destroy them.
contradictionExplanation.tr: The robot was ordered to remove the panels, not destroy them.
contradictionExplanation.ar: The robot was ordered to remove the panels, not destroy them.
contradictionExplanation.kk: Роботу приказали снять, а не уничтожить панели.

reason.en: The robot was ordered to remove the panels, not destroy them.

reason.ar: The robot was ordered to remove the panels, not destroy them.

reason.en: The robot was ordered to remove the panels, not destroy them.
reason.tr: The robot was ordered to remove the panels, not destroy them.
reason.ar: The robot was ordered to remove the panels, not destroy them.
reason.kk: Роботу приказали снять, а не уничтожить панели.

content.ru: Разъёмы отсоединены штатно, крепления срезаны по заводским линиям. Панели пригодны к повторной установке.
content.en: The connectors were properly disconnected and the mounts cut along factory lines. The panels can be reinstalled.
content.tr: The connectors were properly disconnected and the mounts cut along factory lines. The panels can be reinstalled.
content.ar: The connectors were properly disconnected and the mounts cut along factory lines. The panels can be reinstalled.
content.kk: Разъёмы отсоединены штатно, крепления срезаны по заводским линиям. Панели пригодны к повторной установке.

contradictionExplanation.en: The evidence contradicts the claim of a destructive attack.
contradictionExplanation.tr: The evidence contradicts the claim of a destructive attack.
contradictionExplanation.ar: The evidence contradicts the claim of a destructive attack.

reason.en: The evidence contradicts the claim of a destructive attack.
reason.tr: The evidence contradicts the claim of a destructive attack.
reason.ar: The evidence contradicts the claim of a destructive attack.

reason.en: The evidence contradicts the claim of a destructive attack.
reason.tr: The evidence contradicts the claim of a destructive attack.
reason.ar: The evidence contradicts the claim of a destructive attack.

content.ru: Робот и панели находятся в подземном боксе, арендованном Вороновым через посредника GC-17.
content.en: The robot and panels are in an underground unit rented by Voronov through a GC-17 intermediary.
content.tr: The robot and panels are in an underground unit rented by Voronov through a GC-17 intermediary.
content.ar: The robot and panels are in an underground unit rented by Voronov through a GC-17 intermediary.
content.kk: Робот и панели находятся в подземном боксе, арендованном Вороновым через посредника GC-17.

contradictionExplanation.ru: Имущество не утрачено и скрыто самим владельцем.
contradictionExplanation.en: The property was not lost and was concealed by its owner.
contradictionExplanation.tr: The property was not lost and was concealed by its owner.
contradictionExplanation.ar: The property was not lost and was concealed by its owner.
contradictionExplanation.kk: Имущество не утрачено и скрыто самим владельцем.

reason.ru: Имущество не утрачено и скрыто самим владельцем.
reason.en: The property was not lost and was concealed by its owner.
reason.tr: The property was not lost and was concealed by its owner.
reason.ar: The property was not lost and was concealed by its owner.
reason.kk: Имущество не утрачено и скрыто самим владельцем.

content.ru: Проект не выполнил кредитные показатели выработки и рискует быть изъят банком.
content.en: The project failed to meet its generation targets and faces repossession by the bank.
content.tr: The project failed to meet its generation targets and faces repossession by the bank.
content.ar: The project failed to meet its generation targets and faces repossession by the bank.
content.kk: Проект не выполнил кредитные показатели выработки и рискует быть изъят банком.

contradictionExplanation.ru: Финансовый кризис объясняет мотив, но не доказывает инсценировку.
contradictionExplanation.en: The financial crisis explains motive but does not prove staging.
contradictionExplanation.tr: The financial crisis explains motive but does not prove staging.
contradictionExplanation.ar: The financial crisis explains motive but does not prove staging.
contradictionExplanation.kk: Финансовый кризис объясняет мотив, но не доказывает инсценировку.

reason.ru: Финансовый кризис объясняет мотив, но не доказывает инсценировку.
reason.en: The financial crisis explains motive but does not prove staging.
reason.tr: The financial crisis explains motive but does not prove staging.
reason.ar: The financial crisis explains motive but does not prove staging.
reason.kk: Финансовый кризис объясняет мотив, но не доказывает инсценировку.

content.ru: Ночью он слышал только штатный электропривод робота, без машин и голосов.
content.en: During the night, he heard only the robot's normal electric drive, with no vehicles or voices.
content.tr: During the night, he heard only the robot's normal electric drive, with no vehicles or voices.
content.ar: During the night, he heard only the robot's normal electric drive, with no vehicles or voices.
content.kk: Ночью он слышал только штатный электропривод робота, без машин и голосов.

contradictionExplanation.ru: Свидетель согласуется с автономной операцией, но не идентифицирует заказчика.
contradictionExplanation.en: The witness supports an autonomous operation but cannot identify who ordered it.
contradictionExplanation.tr: The witness supports an autonomous operation but cannot identify who ordered it.
contradictionExplanation.ar: The witness supports an autonomous operation but cannot identify who ordered it.
contradictionExplanation.kk: Свидетель согласуется с автономной операцией, но не идентифицирует заказчика.

reason.en: The witness supports an autonomous operation but cannot identify who ordered it.

reason.kk: Свидетель согласуется с автономной операцией, но не идентифицирует заказчика.

ru: Воронов сам запустил робота и приказал бережно демонтировать панели.
Оборудование не уничтожено: оно спрятано вместе с роботом в арендованном боксе.
Ущерб инсценирован ради выплаты. Заявление следует отклонить.
en: The owner initiated the operation himself before the reported attack.
The robot was ordered to remove the panels, not destroy them.
The evidence contradicts the claim of a destructive attack.
The witness supports an autonomous operation but cannot identify who ordered it.
The property was not lost and was concealed by its owner.
The claim is fraudulent and should be rejected.
tr: The owner initiated the operation himself before the reported attack.
The robot was ordered to remove the panels, not destroy them.
The evidence contradicts the claim of a destructive attack.
The witness supports an autonomous operation but cannot identify who ordered it.
The property was not lost and was concealed by its owner.
The claim is fraudulent and should be rejected.
ar: The owner initiated the operation himself before the reported attack.
The robot was ordered to remove the panels, not destroy them.
The evidence contradicts the claim of a destructive attack.
The witness supports an autonomous operation but cannot identify who ordered it.
The property was not lost and was concealed by its owner.
The claim is fraudulent and should be rejected.
kk: Воронов сам запустил робота и приказал бережно демонтировать панели.
Оборудование не уничтожено: оно спрятано вместе с роботом в арендованном боксе.
Ущерб инсценирован ради выплаты. Заявление следует отклонить.

text.ru: Ночью люди в белых рабочих комбинезонах проникли на солнечную ферму, промышленным резаком уничтожили массив панелей и угнали сервисного робота. Прошу возместить оборудование и потерю выработки.
text.en: During the night, people in white coveralls entered the solar farm, destroyed the panel array with industrial cutters, and stole the service robot. I am claiming the equipment and lost generation.
text.tr: During the night, people in white coveralls entered the solar farm, destroyed the panel array with industrial cutters, and stole the service robot. I am claiming the equipment and lost generation.
text.ar: During the night, people in white coveralls entered the solar farm, destroyed the panel array with industrial cutters, and stole the service robot. I am claiming the equipment and lost generation.
text.kk: Ночью люди в белых рабочих комбинезонах проникли на солнечную ферму, промышленным резаком уничтожили массив панелей и угнали сервисного робота. Прошу возместить оборудование и потерю выработки.

text.ru: Неизвестные вывели из строя солнечную ферму.
text.en: Unknown intruders disabled the solar farm.
text.tr: Unknown intruders disabled the solar farm.
text.ar: Unknown intruders disabled the solar farm.
text.kk: Неизвестные вывели из строя солнечную ферму.

text.ru: Сервисный робот действовал без команды владельца.
text.en: The service robot acted without the owner's command.
text.tr: The service robot acted without the owner's command.
text.ar: The service robot acted without the owner's command.
text.kk: Сервисный робот действовал без команды владельца.

text.ru: Панели уничтожены и не находятся под контролем Воронова.
text.en: The panels were destroyed and are no longer under Voronov's control.
text.tr: The panels were destroyed and are no longer under Voronov's control.
text.ar: The panels were destroyed and are no longer under Voronov's control.
text.kk: Панели уничтожены и не находятся под контролем Воронова.

preBrief.ru: Панели сняты слишком аккуратно для вандалов. Иногда отсутствие разрушения — самое сильное доказательство плана. — В. Лебедева
preBrief.en: The panels were removed too carefully for vandals. Sometimes the absence of destruction is the strongest evidence of a plan. — V. Lebedeva
preBrief.tr: The panels were removed too carefully for vandals. Sometimes the absence of destruction is the strongest evidence of a plan. — V. Lebedeva
preBrief.ar: The panels were removed too carefully for vandals. Sometimes the absence of destruction is the strongest evidence of a plan. — V. Lebedeva
preBrief.kk: Панели сняты слишком аккуратно для вандалов. Иногда отсутствие разрушения — самое сильное доказательство плана. — В. Лебедева

postVerdictNote.ru: Серый конвой начал принимать не только груз, но и целые производственные массивы. Следующий маршрут ведёт на удалённый комплекс «Лунный склон».
postVerdictNote.en: The Gray Convoy now handles not just cargo but entire industrial arrays. The next route leads to the remote Moon Slope complex.
postVerdictNote.tr: The Gray Convoy now handles not just cargo but entire industrial arrays. The next route leads to the remote Moon Slope complex.
postVerdictNote.ar: The Gray Convoy now handles not just cargo but entire industrial arrays. The next route leads to the remote Moon Slope complex.
postVerdictNote.kk: Серый конвой начал принимать не только груз, но и целые производственные массивы. Следующий маршрут ведёт на удалённый комплекс «Лунный склон».

nextCaseTeaser.ru: На ферме «Лунный склон» сгорел ангар. В отличие от прошлых складов, владельца в эту ночь там не было — зато был серый грузовик.
nextCaseTeaser.en: A hangar burned at Moon Slope farm. Unlike the owners of earlier warehouses, this owner was away that night—but a gray truck was present.
nextCaseTeaser.tr: A hangar burned at Moon Slope farm. Unlike the owners of earlier warehouses, this owner was away that night—but a gray truck was present.
nextCaseTeaser.ar: A hangar burned at Moon Slope farm. Unlike the owners of earlier warehouses, this owner was away that night—but a gray truck was present.
nextCaseTeaser.kk: На ферме «Лунный склон» сгорел ангар. В отличие от прошлых складов, владельца в эту ночь там не было — зато был серый грузовик.

description.ru: Сеть способна демонтировать и перепродавать крупные энергетические системы, сохраняя их целыми.
description.en: The network can dismantle and resell large energy systems while keeping them intact.
description.tr: The network can dismantle and resell large energy systems while keeping them intact.
description.ar: The network can dismantle and resell large energy systems while keeping them intact.
description.kk: Сеть способна демонтировать и перепродавать крупные энергетические системы, сохраняя их целыми.
